category_sources: Official project page says CRF++ is a generic CRF toolkit applicable to NLP tasks such as named entity recognition and information extraction.
source_facts.description identifies CRF++ as conditional random fields for segmenting and labeling sequential data.
display_name_sources: Official project page title uses CRF++.
docs_sources: No separate official docs domain or docs path was identified; the official homepage is the best documentation surface.
source_facts.homepage is the official CRF++ project page and contains installation, usage, format, option, and API information.
repo_sources: The official CRF++ homepage is hosted from taku910.github.io/crfpp and the matching taku910/crfpp GitHub repository is the official source-control project.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was researched.
tags_sources: Official project page lists NLP sequence labeling applications.
source_facts.description identifies conditional random fields for sequential data labeling.
